(1) Elephants have no long red trunks.
(2) John is an elephant.
(3) John has a long red trunk?

(3) Tru1 is a trunk  [from steps 1, 2]
(4) If some trunk X is a long trunk and X is red then W does not have X as a part  [sentence 1]

(8) Tru1 is red  [from steps 7, 2]
(9) X does not have tru1 as a part  [from steps 3, 4, 6, 8]
